productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Tunic Black Tops
description: Composition Black full sleeve tunic top made of 65% polyester and 35% viscose, with a boat neck and print across the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Heightened style is what this tunic top from the united colors of benetton exudes. Perfect for those warm winter days, this top with a moon surface print is designed for those who never compromise on style and comfort. Team this with slim Fit jeans, stilettos and long earnings for that cool chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.8", Chest-33"
